description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: build-openbios on ubuntu-latest, macos-build-and-test on macos-12, and publish-app on ubuntu-latest. The build-openbios job checks out the repository, cancels previous runs, updates packages, installs dependencies, builds OpenBIOS, and uploads the results as artifacts. The macos-build-and-test job checks out the repository, cancels previous runs, installs dependencies, fetches submodules, builds PCSX-Redux, downloads OpenBIOS and test artifacts, bundles the application, creates a BUILD environment, injects OpenBIOS, packages the application, signs the application, creates a dmg file, and uploads the dmg file and version.json as artifacts. The publish-app job checks out the repository, cancels previous runs, installs Node.js, creates a BUILD environment, downloads the dmg file and version.json, and distributes the application using appcenter-cli and appdistrib/cli.
